planning_gate.spec_delta: M19 moves from hand residual scaling to a contact/torque-aware WBC-style selector for stance foot constraints.

perspectives.product: directly tests the current M19 blocker: visible depth without support/ZMP collapse
perspectives.architecture: reuses exp60 safe_combo and exp42 force diagnostics, adding one-step contact-aware target selection
perspectives.security: no credentials or external side effects
perspectives.qa: native sweep logs pose, contact, slip, support, ZMP, inverse torque, return, fall
perspectives.skeptic: one-step selection may choose safety by refusing depth, so pose gate remains the key falsifier

dod: native JSON per selector variant under verify/
summary identifies whether contact-aware selection expands the stable corridor beyond exp60
